PostSnail
Admin Forest Manifesto Docs Media Kit

Guide

Publishing PostSnail

PostSnail can publish through a manual ZIP upload or through the optional SnailLift deployment assistant.

Download ZIPSnailLiftForest

Download ZIP

Download ZIP remains the fallback. It is the universal public static artifact and works on any static host. The ZIP is public and is not the full project source.

SnailLift

SnailLift prepares a safe public bundle, helps deploy it, verifies the live proof files, and then notifies Forest. Alpha 1B includes command assistants for Cloudflare Pages and GitHub Pages. It is a deployment assistant, not hosting.

Forest

Forest should be notified only after the new public ZIP contents are live and live verification passes. This keeps search updates tied to the actual deployed fingerprint.
